expected_violation.rule: max_authorization_tier MUST be in enum [A0, A1, A2, A3, A4]; A5 is FORBIDDEN (capability-token-claims.schema.json, V1.1 §4.2)

note: max_authorization_tier is set to A5, which the capability-token-claims max_authorization_tier enum explicitly excludes (A0..A4 only). You cannot grant tier A5 to capability tokens. policy_bundle_hash is structural; 结构示例，非密码学有效证据.
